proposal1.heroHeadline: Growthmapviewer is losing 200 hours a year on proposal writing. Here's the breakdown.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, crafting proposals is a slow process. Automated generation completes it in 47 seconds, tailored to your services.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Every delay in your current process is a loss that compounds over time.

problems.title: Lost Client Engagement
problems.description: Every day spent writing proposals is a day your competitors are engaging potential clients. Your slow process bleeds opportunities.

problems.title: Wasted Labor Costs
problems.description: Manual proposal creation costs you $15,000 annually in labor. These are funds that could boost other growth areas.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Inconsistent proposal branding leads to a diluted market presence. This inconsistency costs potential trust and recognition.

problems.title: Decreased Productivity
problems.description: Employees spend 6 hours per proposal, draining productivity. That's time not spent on strategic tasks.

problems.title: Delayed Revenue
problems.description: Proposal delays mean slow deal closures. Every day of delay is potential revenue slipping through the cracks.

problems.title: Client Dissatisfaction
problems.description: Clients expect quick responses. Delayed proposals lead to dissatisfaction and lost client trust, impacting future business.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system eliminates all the above inefficiencies.

solutions.title: Instant Proposals
solutions.description: Current method takes hours. Our system delivers a polished proposal in 47 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Branding varies with manual processes. With our system, every proposal aligns with your brand identity.

solutions.title: Cost Efficiency
solutions.description: You're currently overpaying for labor. Our system cuts labor costs, freeing up resources.

solutions.title: Increased Deal Velocity
solutions.description: Proposal delays slow down deal closures. Our system speeds up the process, closing deals faster.

solutions.title: Enhanced Client Experience
solutions.description: Current delays frustrate clients. Our system ensures fast, efficient communication, improving satisfaction.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Growthmapviewer's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Growthmapviewer around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Growthmapviewer.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Growth with Data-Driven Insights
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We propose a comprehensive strategy to enhance your market reach and optimize conversions using Growthmapviewer's expertise.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently facing losses due to missed opportunities in digital engagement.

problems.title: Low Website Traffic
problems.description: Every day without increased traffic results in potential customers not discovering your brand. This translates to significant revenue losses monthly.

problems.title: Poor Conversion Rates
problems.description: Without optimized conversion strategies, each visitor leaving the site without purchasing is lost revenue. This impacts your bottom line directly.

problems.title: Ineffective Social Media
problems.description: Lack of engagement on social platforms means missing out on brand visibility. This results in decreased brand authority and customer retention.

problems.title: Underutilized Email Campaigns
problems.description: Ineffective email strategies lead to unsubscribers and low open rates. This reduces potential sales by not capitalizing on direct customer communication.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Inconsistent branding across channels can confuse potential clients, leading to a loss of trust and ultimately, a loss of sales.

problems.title: Weak Market Positioning
problems.description: Without strong market positioning, competitors can easily attract your potential customers. This results in lost opportunities for market leadership.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our tailored solutions address these issues directly, ensuring tangible growth for Acme Corp.

solutions.title: SEO Optimization
solutions.description: Enhance your website's visibility on search engines. This increases organic traffic and potential customer reach.

solutions.title: Conversion Rate Optimization
solutions.description: Improve user experience and conversion strategies. This transforms visitors into customers, boosting sales.

solutions.title: Email Marketing Campaigns
solutions.description: Develop targeted email campaigns. This increases engagement rates and maximizes direct sales opportunities.

solutions.title: Social Media Strategy
solutions.description: Craft a cohesive social media plan. This boosts brand presence and customer interaction across platforms.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Growthmapviewer stands as the strategic partner you need for transformative growth.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Expertise

whyUsCards.title: Data-Driven Approach
whyUsCards.description: We utilize comprehensive data analysis to inform every strategy and decision.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Focus
whyUsCards.description: We prioritize understanding your unique business challenges to tailor our solutions effectively.

whyUsCards.title: Innovative Solutions
whyUsCards.description: Constant innovation ensures we deliver cutting-edge strategies that keep you ahead of the competition.

team.name: there
